goal: Build and typecheck the Cloudflare Worker with Discord webhook routing, signature verification, and Kestra relay
summary: Phase 1 complete. Scaffolded the Cloudflare Worker project with pnpm, implemented Ed25519 signature verification via Web Crypto API, built routing for THREAD_CREATE relay (with Discord API enrichment), MESSAGE_COMPONENT interactions (approve/reject buttons), and MESSAGE_REACTION_ADD approval events. Consolidated all shared TypeScript types into types.ts. Verified zero TypeScript compilation errors across all worker source files. Dependencies are installed and reproducible.
stepSummaries:
1. Scaffold repo structure: worker/, kestra/flows/, prompts/, scripts/; create wrangler.toml, package.json, tsconfig.json [verified]
  2. Implement Discord ed25519 webhook signature verification using Web Crypto API and route requests to relay or interaction handlers [verified]
  3. Implement THREAD_CREATE relay handler: validate signature, format payload, POST to Kestra webhook URL [verified]
  4. Implement interaction handler for admin channel reactions: parse MESSAGE_REACTION_ADD, trigger Kestra flow for GitHub issue creation [verified]
  5. Define shared TypeScript types for Discord webhook payloads, interaction payloads, and Kestra relay contracts [verified]
  6. Install dependencies and verify worker TypeScript compiles with no errors [verified]
reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Steps 2-6 all ran tsc --noEmit (syntactic verification) which validates the load-bearing TypeScript code. Step 1 was pure scaffolding with proxy file-existence checks, which is acceptable for directory creation. No step relied solely on proxy/sentinel verification for semantic logic.
gateVerdicts.evidence: pnpm exec tsc --noEmit exits 0 across all steps. Steps 2-6 explicitly used typecheck as verification.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Phase goal was to build and typecheck the Cloudflare Worker with Discord webhook routing, signature verification, and Kestra relay. The combined output includes index.ts with routing, verify.ts with crypto.subtle.verify, relay.ts with Kestra POST, interaction.ts with button handling, reaction.ts with MESSAGE_REACTION_ADD filtering, and types.ts with shared contracts. All compile cleanly.
gateVerdicts.evidence: worker/src/index.ts routes THREAD_CREATE, interactions (type 3/5), and MESSAGE_REACTION_ADD. worker/src/lib/verify.ts implements Ed25519 verify. worker/src/lib/relay.ts POSTs to Kestra. TypeScript compilation exits 0 with no errors.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Deferred to later phases: Kestra flow YAMLs (phase 2+), Qdrant collection setup scripts (phase 2+), LLM judge prompts (phase 2+), README documentation (phase 3+), and end-to-end smoke tests with curl against real Discord webhooks (phase 3+). Worker foundation is complete and ready to accept those integrations.
gateVerdicts.evidence: No Kestra, Qdrant, prompt, or README files created yet. No deployment or runtime smoke tests performed.
